hotel_name: Sojourner's Suite at 605, City-view condotel near the airport at Monte Carlo Residences Charlene

reviews.title: Pretty good!
reviews.positives: The place is well-equipped for a staycation vibe, which includes aircon, access to Netflix, towels, two free water bottles, and the essential appliances.
reviews.negatives:
As I haven't used their coffee machine, I visual how-to instruction would be nice.
Also, I'm not feeling comfortable stepping on bathmats used by previous guests. Maybe an option for a small washable bath towel as a mat can be also considered.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great place to stay and has free coffee machine very one of a kind. Kind and very responsive host, very convenient location as well
